parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'generated_at', NOW(),
  'digest_type', 'pipeline_health_digest',
  'active_opps', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go')),
  'pipeline_value_m', ROUND((SELECT SUM(COALESCE(estimated_value,0))::numeric/1e6 FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go')), 1),
  'pursue_count', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE gda_label = 'PURSUE' AND stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go')),
  'evaluate_count', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE gda_label IN ('EVALUATE') AND stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go')),
  'monitor_count', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE gda_label = 'MONITOR' AND stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go')),
  'avg_score', ROUND((SELECT AVG(gda_score)::numeric FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go') AND gda_score > 0)),
  'due_7d', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go') AND response_deadline IS NOT NULL AND response_deadline::date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + 7),
  'due_14d', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go') AND response_deadline IS NOT NULL AND response_deadline::date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + 14),
  'unanalyzed', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go') AND (ai_analysis IS NULL OR ai_analysis = '')),
  'capture_plans', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_capture_plans),
  'competitors', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_competitor_watchlist WHERE status = 'active'),
  'active_contracts', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_active_contracts),
  'active_risks', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_risk_register WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(status,'')) IN ('active','open')),
  'top_pursue', (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(t)) FROM (SELECT opp_title, agency, estimated_value, gda_score, response_deadline FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE gda_label = 'PURSUE' AND stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go') ORDER BY gda_score DESC LIMIT 10) t),
  'dept_breakdown', (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(t)) FROM (SELECT dept, COUNT(*) as cnt, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(estimated_value,0))::numeric/1e6, 1) as value_m FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go') GROUP BY dept ORDER BY cnt DESC) t),
  'new_opps_24h', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE synced_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'),
  'scored_24h', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND ai_analysis IS NOT NULL)
) as digest
